parameters: Geez, I really didn't want to sweat.
There's nothing to be afraid of anymore!
I won't make it in time!
\>It's dangerous if we stay like this!
You cancelled it out with magic?!
What was that power just now?
Hmmm, but what was that magic at the end?
That was some ridiculous fire power,
it didn't seem normal at all...
↑選択肢分岐用にスイッチはそのまま
What was that power just now?
Did his latent powers awake from anger...?
No, more importantly, that was a lifesaver...
↑選択肢分岐用にスイッチ２を残す
